description: REQ-TAG-017 requires importing and calling domain pipelines tagChipUpdate, applyFilterOrSearch, and parseFilterInput without reimplementing them. The TauriFeedAdapter interface declares dispatchAddTagViaChip, dispatchRemoveTagViaChip, dispatchApplyFilter, dispatchRemoveFilter, dispatchClearFilter as optional methods (tauriFeedAdapter.ts:33-41) but createTauriFeedAdapter() does NOT implement them (tauriFeedAdapter.ts:44-58). This means all tag add/remove/filter operations executed by the effectful shell (FeedList.svelte:110-124) silently become no-ops. Furthermore, grep for 'tagChipUpdate|applyFilterOrSearch|parseFilterInput' in the entire feed directory returns zero hits — none of the domain pipelines are imported anywhere in the feed module.
